# Generated code — DO NOT EDIT

`prompt_definition.py` (Pydantic v2) is code-generated from the single source of
truth `schemas/jsonschema/prompt-definition.schema.json` (constitution C-07) via

CI fails on any hand-edit or drift (`moon run schemas:codegen-check`).
